title: Methods and properties that don't access instance data should be static
description: Avoid using instance methods and properties without any access to instance data. This can lead to tight coupling and make your code harder to test and maintain.
message: Instance methods and properties should access instance data.
recommendation: Extract methods or properties to a static class

noncompliant.description: Instance method without accessing instance data

why_is_this_an_issue: Using instance methods and properties without accessing instance data can make your code harder to test and maintain.
how_to_fix: Extract methods or properties to a static class

logic.check_type_doc: Checks if a method definition has an argument 'self'

function_code:
def check_method_has_self(node):
    return any(arg_node.get('value', '').lower() in ['self', 'none'] for arg_node in node['args']['args'])

metadata.title: Methods and properties that don't access instance data should be static
